zimmer.name: zimmer
zimmer.description: The Zimmer orchestrator itself — self-hostable AI coding agent orchestration.

agent-orchestrator.name: agent-orchestrator
agent-orchestrator.description: The Zimmer orchestrator Rails app itself — models, controllers, jobs, services, views, migrations, tests.

agents.name: agents

catalog-mgmt-proctor.name: catalog-mgmt-proctor
catalog-mgmt-proctor.description: Subagent phase (proctor) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.

catalog-mgmt-save.name: catalog-mgmt-save
catalog-mgmt-save.description: Subagent phase (save) spawned by the catalog-management lead root.
